name: Doug Stanhope
bio: Doug Stanhope is an American stand-up comedian, author, and podcast host whose material consists of profane, confrontational, and nihilistic observations on life, addiction, and politics. He won the San Francisco International Comedy Competition in 1995 and has released numerous albums and specials, including Before Turning the Gun on Himself and The Dying of a Last Breed. He has long been admired within comedy as an uncompromising road comic.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up career in Las Vegas
Wins the San Francisco International Comedy Competition
Releases special Before Turning the Gun on Himself
Releases special The Dying of a Last Breed

accolades: Winner, San Francisco International Comedy Competition (1995)

The Dying of a Last Breed
